sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19690" key="ba/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάω</orth>, <sense id="n19690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βαίνω</ref></xr>, only in compds.</sense> </entryFree>
